purpose: Validate OpenID Connect ID tokens against caller-supplied issuer metadata and key material without performing remote discovery.

endpoints.description: Validate an OIDC ID token with explicit issuer, audience, nonce, and key inputs.

dependencies.purpose: Standards-compliant JWT and JWK verification for OIDC ID tokens

sidecar_specification.purpose: Local OpenID Connect ID token validation with explicit trust inputs.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use when a login or bearer flow already has issuer metadata and JWK material available and needs local ID token validation.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use for remote discovery, authorization code exchange, session management, or access token introspection.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Load trusted issuer, audience, and JWKS from config. 2) Call /oidc/id-token/validate with the token. 3) Use claims only when valid is true.

common_calls.description: Validate an ID token from a configured provider

failure_modes.condition: Issuer, audience, nonce, or expiry claims do not validate
failure_modes.symptom: 200 response with valid false and claim errors
failure_modes.recovery: Use trusted inputs that match the issued ID token

failure_modes.condition: No matching signing key exists in supplied JWKS
failure_modes.symptom: 200 response with valid false and key lookup error
failure_modes.recovery: Refresh trusted JWKS outside this module and retry

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls
Must not trust token claims before signature verification

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Use jose jwtVerify with a JWKS created from the supplied jwks object. Enforce issuer and audience, validate nonce when provided, and reject unsigned or unsupported algorithms.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: OIDC ID tokens require claim checks beyond plain JWT verification, especially issuer, audience, nonce, and expiry. Access tokens are not interchangeable with ID tokens.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Keep verification local and deterministic by requiring all trust material in the request or configuration boundary.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not perform remote OIDC discovery or JWKS fetches inside this module.
